ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot indicating the time 2 o'clock using its arms.  The robot will use both arms, extending them to the sides to form a rough approximation of the hands on a clock face. The sequence will emphasize the '2' position, with slight movements to enhance the visual representation. Frame 1 will show both arms extended to the sides at shoulder height to create the base clock face. Frame 2 will show the left arm slightly lower, and the right arm slightly higher, starting the '2' shape. Frame 3 will show the left arm more clearly at the '10' position and the right arm at the '2' position. Frame 4 will slightly adjust the angles to refine the '2' shape, making it more pronounced. The final frame will show a brief pause before returning to a neutral position.

frames.beat: both arms extend outwards, forming a clock face
arms begin to shape the number two
left arm points to ten, right arm to two
refined pose for the two o'clock marker
holding the two o'clock position briefly
